entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol providing swap liquidity, DEX pools, DEX Lite routing, dynamic-fee and range controls, and integrations across Ethereum and multiple EVM networks.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates chain-specific Fluid rows, Fluid DEX, and Fluid DEX Lite into one Fluid exchange entity. Current first-party technical documentation publishes Fluid DEX V2 and DEX Lite liquidity-source integration specifications alongside active DEX contracts, fee, range, reserve, resolver, and swap interfaces.

evidence.title: Fluid Technical Docs — Contracts Overview
evidence.notes: First-party technical documentation exposes the Fluid protocol contract surface and dedicated DEX, DEX V2, DEX Lite, fee, range, reserve, resolver, oracle, and integration documentation.

evidence.title: Fluid DEX V2: Liquidity Source Integration
evidence.notes: Current first-party integration documentation describes Fluid DEX V2 swap-liquidity integration and the active DEX V2 contract interface.

evidence.title: Fluid DEX Lite: Liquidity Source Integration
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Fluid DEX Lite as a liquidity source and publishes its integration and swap interface under the same Fluid protocol documentation.
